projects.name: Demo Repo via Codex-style Wrapper
projects.description: Example repo-agent pair that shows how to route bounded code-assistant tasks through a local wrapper script.

agent-health.name: Agent Health
agent-health.description: Check that the repo-local agent wrapper is callable.

delegate-task.name: Delegate Task
delegate-task.description: Send a bounded implementation request into the repo-local Codex-style wrapper.
delegate-task.title: Codex task: {input}

review-then-implement.name: Review Then Implement
review-then-implement.description: Example serial flow for an assistant board: ask for a plan, then apply the change.

steps.title: Review request and propose plan
steps.payload: Review this coding request and propose a bounded plan: {input}

projects.name: Demo Repo via Claude-style Wrapper
projects.description: Example repo-agent pair for a second assistant on the same repo.

delegate-task.name: Delegate Task
delegate-task.description: Send a bounded implementation request into the repo-local Claude-style wrapper.
delegate-task.title: Claude task: {input}
